/* REAL vs PRESUPUESTO por mes (y acumulado a mes) + AÑO ANTERIOR */
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        c.NUM_CTA,
        c.NOMBRE,
        c.TIPO,
        c.NIVEL,
        /* Naturaleza por rango (fallback al campo) */
        CASE
            WHEN c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH '1' THEN 'D'
            WHEN c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH '2' THEN 'A'
            WHEN c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH '3' THEN 'A'
            WHEN c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH '4' THEN 'A'
            WHEN c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH '5' THEN 'D'
            WHEN c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH '6' THEN 'D'
            WHEN c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH '7' THEN 'D'
            WHEN c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH '8' THEN 'D'
            WHEN c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH '9' THEN 'D'
            ELSE CASE
                WHEN UPPER(CAST(c.NATURALEZA AS VARCHAR(5))) IN ('A','2','C') THEN 'A'
                ELSE 'D'
            END
        END AS NATZ,
        
        COALESCE(s.INICIAL,0) AS INICIAL,
        
        /* === ACUMULADOS DE REAL AÑO ACTUAL (hasta :mes) === */
        /* Cargos */
        CASE CAST(:mes AS INTEGER)
            WHEN 1 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO01,0)
            WHEN 2 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO02,0)
            WHEN 3 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO03,0)
            WHEN 4 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO04,0)
            WHEN 5 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO04,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO05,0)
            WHEN 6 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO04,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO05,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO06,0)
            WHEN 7 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO04,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO05,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO06,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO07,0)
            WHEN 8 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO04,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO05,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO06,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO07,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO08,0)
            WHEN 9 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO04,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO05,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO06,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO07,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO08,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO09,0)
            WHEN 10 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO04,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO05,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO06,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO07,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO08,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO09,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO10,0)
            WHEN 11 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO04,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO05,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO06,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO07,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO08,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO09,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO10,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO11,0)
            ELSE COALESCE(s.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO04,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO05,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO06,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO07,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO08,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO09,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO10,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO11,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO12,0)
        END AS CARGOS_ACUM,
        
        /* Abonos */
        CASE CAST(:mes AS INTEGER)
            WHEN 1 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO01,0)
            WHEN 2 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO02,0)
            WHEN 3 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO03,0)
            WHEN 4 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO03,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO04,0)
            WHEN 5 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO03,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO04,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO05,0)
            WHEN 6 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO03,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO04,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO05,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO06,0)
            WHEN 7 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO03,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO04,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO05,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO06,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO07,0)
            WHEN 8 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO03,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO04,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO05,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO06,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO07,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO08,0)
            WHEN 9 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO03,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO04,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO05,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO06,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO07,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO08,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO09,0)
            WHEN 10 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO03,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO04,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO05,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO06,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO07,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO08,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO09,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO10,0)
            WHEN 11 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO03,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO04,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO05,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO06,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO07,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO08,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO09,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO10,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO11,0)
            ELSE COALESCE(s.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO03,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO04,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO05,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO06,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO07,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO08,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO09,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO10,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO11,0)+COALESCE(s.ABONO12,0)
        END AS ABONOS_ACUM,
        
        /* === SOLO EL REAL DEL MES ELEGIDO === */
        CASE CAST(:mes AS INTEGER)
            WHEN 1 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO01,0)
            WHEN 2 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO02,0)
            WHEN 3 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO03,0)
            WHEN 4 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO04,0)
            WHEN 5 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO05,0)
            WHEN 6 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO06,0)
            WHEN 7 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO07,0)
            WHEN 8 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO08,0)
            WHEN 9 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO09,0)
            WHEN 10 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO10,0)
            WHEN 11 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO11,0)
            WHEN 12 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO12,0)
            ELSE 0
        END AS CARGO_MES,
        
        CASE CAST(:mes AS INTEGER)
            WHEN 1 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO01,0)
            WHEN 2 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO02,0)
            WHEN 3 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO03,0)
            WHEN 4 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO04,0)
            WHEN 5 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO05,0)
            WHEN 6 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO06,0)
            WHEN 7 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO07,0)
            WHEN 8 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO08,0)
            WHEN 9 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO09,0)
            WHEN 10 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO10,0)
            WHEN 11 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO11,0)
            WHEN 12 THEN COALESCE(s.ABONO12,0)
            ELSE 0
        END AS ABONO_MES,

        /* === AÑO ANTERIOR - ACUMULADOS (hasta :mes) === */
        /* Cargos Año Anterior */
        CASE CAST(:mes AS INTEGER)
            WHEN 1 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO01,0)
            WHEN 2 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO02,0)
            WHEN 3 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO03,0)
            WHEN 4 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO04,0)
            WHEN 5 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO04,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO05,0)
            WHEN 6 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO04,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO05,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO06,0)
            WHEN 7 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO04,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO05,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO06,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO07,0)
            WHEN 8 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO04,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO05,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO06,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO07,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO08,0)
            WHEN 9 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO04,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO05,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO06,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO07,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO08,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO09,0)
            WHEN 10 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO04,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO05,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO06,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO07,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO08,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO09,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO10,0)
            WHEN 11 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO04,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO05,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO06,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO07,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO08,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO09,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO10,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO11,0)
            ELSE COALESCE(sa.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO04,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO05,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO06,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO07,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO08,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO09,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO10,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO11,0)+COALESCE(sa.CARGO12,0)
        END AS CARGOS_ACUM_ANT,
        
        /* Abonos Año Anterior */
        CASE CAST(:mes AS INTEGER)
            WHEN 1 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO01,0)
            WHEN 2 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO02,0)
            WHEN 3 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO03,0)
            WHEN 4 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO03,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO04,0)
            WHEN 5 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO03,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO04,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO05,0)
            WHEN 6 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO03,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO04,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO05,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO06,0)
            WHEN 7 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO03,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO04,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO05,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO06,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO07,0)
            WHEN 8 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO03,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO04,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO05,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO06,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO07,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO08,0)
            WHEN 9 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO03,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO04,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO05,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO06,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO07,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO08,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO09,0)
            WHEN 10 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO03,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO04,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO05,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO06,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO07,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO08,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO09,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO10,0)
            WHEN 11 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO03,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO04,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO05,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO06,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO07,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO08,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO09,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO10,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO11,0)
            ELSE COALESCE(sa.ABONO01,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO02,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO03,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO04,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO05,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO06,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO07,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO08,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO09,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO10,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO11,0)+COALESCE(sa.ABONO12,0)
        END AS ABONOS_ACUM_ANT,
        
        /* === SOLO EL MES DEL AÑO ANTERIOR === */
        CASE CAST(:mes AS INTEGER)
            WHEN 1 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO01,0)
            WHEN 2 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO02,0)
            WHEN 3 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO03,0)
            WHEN 4 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO04,0)
            WHEN 5 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO05,0)
            WHEN 6 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO06,0)
            WHEN 7 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO07,0)
            WHEN 8 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO08,0)
            WHEN 9 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO09,0)
            WHEN 10 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO10,0)
            WHEN 11 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO11,0)
            WHEN 12 THEN COALESCE(sa.CARGO12,0)
            ELSE 0
        END AS CARGO_MES_ANT,
        
        CASE CAST(:mes AS INTEGER)
            WHEN 1 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO01,0)
            WHEN 2 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO02,0)
            WHEN 3 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO03,0)
            WHEN 4 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO04,0)
            WHEN 5 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO05,0)
            WHEN 6 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO06,0)
            WHEN 7 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO07,0)
            WHEN 8 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO08,0)
            WHEN 9 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO09,0)
            WHEN 10 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO10,0)
            WHEN 11 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO11,0)
            WHEN 12 THEN COALESCE(sa.ABONO12,0)
            ELSE 0
        END AS ABONO_MES_ANT,
        
        /* ======= PRESUPUESTO ======= */
        CASE CAST(:mes AS INTEGER)
            WHEN 1 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)
            WHEN 2 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)
            WHEN 3 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)
            WHEN 4 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)
            WHEN 5 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP05,0)
            WHEN 6 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP06,0)
            WHEN 7 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP07,0)
            WHEN 8 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP08,0)
            WHEN 9 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP09,0)
            WHEN 10 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP10,0)
            WHEN 11 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP11,0)
            WHEN 12 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP12,0)
            ELSE 0
        END AS PRESUP_MES,
        
        /* Presupuesto acumulado a :mes */
        CASE CAST(:mes AS INTEGER)
            WHEN 1 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)
            WHEN 2 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)
            WHEN 3 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)
            WHEN 4 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)
            WHEN 5 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP05,0)
            WHEN 6 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP05,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP06,0)
            WHEN 7 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP05,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP06,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP07,0)
            WHEN 8 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP05,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP06,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP07,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP08,0)
            WHEN 9 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP05,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP06,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP07,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP08,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP09,0)
            WHEN 10 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP05,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP06,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP07,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP08,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP09,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP10,0)
            WHEN 11 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP05,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP06,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP07,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP08,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP09,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP10,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP11,0)
            ELSE COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP05,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP06,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP07,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP08,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP09,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP10,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP11,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP12,0)
        END AS PRESUP_ACUM,
        
        /* Nombre del mes para mostrar */
        CASE CAST(:mes AS INTEGER)
            WHEN 1 THEN 'ENERO'
            WHEN 2 THEN 'FEBRERO'
            WHEN 3 THEN 'MARZO'
            WHEN 4 THEN 'ABRIL'
            WHEN 5 THEN 'MAYO'
            WHEN 6 THEN 'JUNIO'
            WHEN 7 THEN 'JULIO'
            WHEN 8 THEN 'AGOSTO'
            WHEN 9 THEN 'SEPTIEMBRE'
            WHEN 10 THEN 'OCTUBRE'
            WHEN 11 THEN 'NOVIEMBRE'
            WHEN 12 THEN 'DICIEMBRE'
            ELSE 'MES'
        END AS MES_NOMBRE
        
    FROM CUENTAS26 c
    LEFT JOIN SALDOS26 s 
        ON s.NUM_CTA = c.NUM_CTA
    LEFT JOIN SALDOS25 sa
        ON sa.NUM_CTA = c.NUM_CTA
    LEFT JOIN PRESUP26 pr 
        ON pr.NUM_CTA = c.NUM_CTA
    WHERE c.STATUS='A'
      AND ( :prefijo IS NULL OR c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH :prefijo )
)
SELECT 
    b.NUM_CTA,
    b.NOMBRE,
    b.NIVEL,
    b.MES_NOMBRE,
    b.NATZ AS NATURALEZA,
    
    /* REAL del mes firmado por naturaleza */
    CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGO_MES - b.ABONO_MES)
        ELSE (b.ABONO_MES - b.CARGO_MES)
    END AS REAL_MES,
    
    /* REAL acumulado YTD (sin saldo inicial) firmado */
    CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM - b.ABONOS_ACUM)
        ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM - b.CARGOS_ACUM)
    END AS REAL_ACUM,
    
    /* REAL del mes AÑO ANTERIOR firmado por naturaleza */
    CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGO_MES_ANT - b.ABONO_MES_ANT)
        ELSE (b.ABONO_MES_ANT - b.CARGO_MES_ANT)
    END AS REAL_MES_ANT,
    
    /* REAL acumulado AÑO ANTERIOR firmado */
    CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT - b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT)
        ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT - b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT)
    END AS REAL_ACUM_ANT,
    
    /* PRESUPUESTO */
    b.PRESUP_MES,
    b.PRESUP_ACUM,
    
    /* VARIACIONES vs PRESUPUESTO */
    (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGO_MES - b.ABONO_MES)
        ELSE (b.ABONO_MES - b.CARGO_MES)
    END) - b.PRESUP_MES AS VAR_MES,
    
    (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM - b.ABONOS_ACUM)
        ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM - b.CARGOS_ACUM)
    END) - b.PRESUP_ACUM AS VAR_ACUM,
    
    /* VARIACIONES vs AÑO ANTERIOR */
    (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGO_MES - b.ABONO_MES)
        ELSE (b.ABONO_MES - b.CARGO_MES)
    END) - (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGO_MES_ANT - b.ABONO_MES_ANT)
        ELSE (b.ABONO_MES_ANT - b.CARGO_MES_ANT)
    END) AS VAR_MES_ANT,
    
    (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM - b.ABONOS_ACUM)
        ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM - b.CARGOS_ACUM)
    END) - (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT - b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT)
        ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT - b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT)
    END) AS VAR_ACUM_ANT,
    
    /* ========= PORCENTAJES ========= */
    /* 1. Ppto vs real MES: (REAL_MES / PRESUP_MES - 1) * 100 */
    CASE 
        WHEN b.PRESUP_MES = 0 OR b.PRESUP_MES IS NULL THEN 0
        ELSE ((CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGO_MES - b.ABONO_MES)
                ELSE (b.ABONO_MES - b.CARGO_MES)
              END) / b.PRESUP_MES - 1) * 100
    END AS PCT_REAL_VS_PPTO_MES,
    
    /* 2. Real ant vs real MES: (REAL_MES / REAL_MES_ANT - 1) * 100 */
    CASE 
        WHEN (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGO_MES_ANT - b.ABONO_MES_ANT)
                ELSE (b.ABONO_MES_ANT - b.CARGO_MES_ANT)
              END) = 0 OR (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGO_MES_ANT - b.ABONO_MES_ANT)
                ELSE (b.ABONO_MES_ANT - b.CARGO_MES_ANT)
              END) IS NULL THEN 0
        ELSE ((CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGO_MES - b.ABONO_MES)
                ELSE (b.ABONO_MES - b.CARGO_MES)
              END) / (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGO_MES_ANT - b.ABONO_MES_ANT)
                ELSE (b.ABONO_MES_ANT - b.CARGO_MES_ANT)
              END) - 1) * 100
    END AS PCT_REAL_VS_ANT_MES,
    
    /* 3. Ppto vs real ACUM: (REAL_ACUM / PRESUP_ACUM - 1) * 100 */
    CASE 
        WHEN b.PRESUP_ACUM = 0 OR b.PRESUP_ACUM IS NULL THEN 0
        ELSE ((CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM - b.ABONOS_ACUM)
                ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM - b.CARGOS_ACUM)
              END) / b.PRESUP_ACUM - 1) * 100
    END AS PCT_REAL_VS_PPTO_ACUM,
    
    /* 4. Real ant vs real ACUM: (REAL_ACUM / REAL_ACUM_ANT - 1) * 100 */
    CASE 
        WHEN (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT - b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT)
                ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT - b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT)
              END) = 0 OR (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT - b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT)
                ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT - b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT)
              END) IS NULL THEN 0
        ELSE ((CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM - b.ABONOS_ACUM)
                ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM - b.CARGOS_ACUM)
              END) / (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT - b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT)
                ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT - b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT)
              END) - 1) * 100
    END AS PCT_REAL_VS_ANT_ACUM
    
FROM base b
WHERE ( :nivel IS NULL OR :nivel = 0 OR b.NIVEL = :nivel )
ORDER BY b.NUM_CTA;

/* REAL vs PRESUPUESTO por mes (y acumulado a mes) + AÑO ANTERIOR */
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        c.NUM_CTA,
        c.NOMBRE,
        c.TIPO,
        c.NIVEL,
        /* Naturaleza por rango (fallback al campo) */
        CASE
            WHEN c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH '1' THEN 'D'
            WHEN c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH '2' THEN 'A'
            WHEN c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH '3' THEN 'A'
            WHEN c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH '4' THEN 'A'
            WHEN c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH '5' THEN 'D'
            WHEN c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH '6' THEN 'D'
            WHEN c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH '7' THEN 'D'
            WHEN c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH '8' THEN 'D'
            WHEN c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH '9' THEN 'D'
            ELSE CASE
                WHEN UPPER(CAST(c.NATURALEZA AS VARCHAR(5))) IN ('A','2','C') THEN 'A'
                ELSE 'D'
            END
        END AS NATZ,
        
        COALESCE(s.INICIAL,0) AS INICIAL,
        
        /* === ACUMULADOS DE REAL AÑO ACTUAL (hasta :mes) === */
        /* Cargos */
        CASE CAST(:mes AS INTEGER)
            WHEN 1 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO01,0)

            WHEN 9 THEN COALESCE(s.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO04,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO05,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO06,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO07,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO08,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO09,0)

            ELSE COALESCE(s.CARGO01,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO02,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO03,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO04,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO05,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO06,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO07,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO08,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO09,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO10,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO11,0)+COALESCE(s.CARGO12,0)

        /* === SOLO EL MES DEL AÑO ANTERIOR === */

        CASE CAST(:mes AS INTEGER)
            WHEN 1 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)
            WHEN 2 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)
            WHEN 3 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)
            WHEN 4 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)
            WHEN 5 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP05,0)
            WHEN 6 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP06,0)
            WHEN 7 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP07,0)
            WHEN 8 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP08,0)
            WHEN 9 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP09,0)
            WHEN 10 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP10,0)
            WHEN 11 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP11,0)
            WHEN 12 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP12,0)
            ELSE 0
        END AS PRESUP_MES,
        
        /* Presupuesto acumulado a :mes */
        CASE CAST(:mes AS INTEGER)
            WHEN 1 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)
            WHEN 2 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)
            WHEN 3 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)
            WHEN 4 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)
            WHEN 5 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP05,0)
            WHEN 6 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP05,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP06,0)
            WHEN 7 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP05,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP06,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP07,0)
            WHEN 8 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP05,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP06,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP07,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP08,0)
            WHEN 9 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP05,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP06,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP07,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP08,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP09,0)
            WHEN 10 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP05,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP06,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP07,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP08,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP09,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP10,0)
            WHEN 11 THEN COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP05,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP06,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP07,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP08,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP09,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP10,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP11,0)
            ELSE COALESCE(pr.PRESUP01,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP02,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP03,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP04,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP05,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP06,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP07,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP08,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP09,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP10,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP11,0)+COALESCE(pr.PRESUP12,0)
        END AS PRESUP_ACUM,
        
        /* Nombre del mes para mostrar */
        CASE CAST(:mes AS INTEGER)
            WHEN 1 THEN 'ENERO'
            WHEN 2 THEN 'FEBRERO'
            WHEN 3 THEN 'MARZO'
            WHEN 4 THEN 'ABRIL'
            WHEN 5 THEN 'MAYO'
            WHEN 6 THEN 'JUNIO'
            WHEN 7 THEN 'JULIO'
            WHEN 8 THEN 'AGOSTO'
            WHEN 9 THEN 'SEPTIEMBRE'
            WHEN 10 THEN 'OCTUBRE'
            WHEN 11 THEN 'NOVIEMBRE'
            WHEN 12 THEN 'DICIEMBRE'
            ELSE 'MES'
        END AS MES_NOMBRE
        
    FROM CUENTAS26 c
    LEFT JOIN SALDOS26 s 
        ON s.NUM_CTA = c.NUM_CTA
    LEFT JOIN SALDOS25 sa
        ON sa.NUM_CTA = c.NUM_CTA
    LEFT JOIN PRESUP26 pr 
        ON pr.NUM_CTA = c.NUM_CTA
    WHERE c.STATUS='A'
      AND ( :prefijo IS NULL OR c.NUM_CTA STARTING WITH :prefijo )
)
SELECT 
    b.NUM_CTA,
    b.NOMBRE,
    b.NIVEL,
    b.MES_NOMBRE,
    b.NATZ AS NATURALEZA,
    
    /* REAL del mes firmado por naturaleza */
    CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGO_MES - b.ABONO_MES)
        ELSE (b.ABONO_MES - b.CARGO_MES)
    END AS REAL_MES,
    
    /* REAL acumulado YTD (sin saldo inicial) firmado */
    CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM - b.ABONOS_ACUM)
        ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM - b.CARGOS_ACUM)
    END AS REAL_ACUM,
    
    /* REAL del mes AÑO ANTERIOR firmado por naturaleza */
    CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGO_MES_ANT - b.ABONO_MES_ANT)
        ELSE (b.ABONO_MES_ANT - b.CARGO_MES_ANT)
    END AS REAL_MES_ANT,
    
    /* REAL acumulado AÑO ANTERIOR firmado */
    CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT - b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT)
        ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT - b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT)
    END AS REAL_ACUM_ANT,
    
    /* PRESUPUESTO */
    b.PRESUP_MES,
    b.PRESUP_ACUM,
    
    /* VARIACIONES vs PRESUPUESTO */
    (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGO_MES - b.ABONO_MES)
        ELSE (b.ABONO_MES - b.CARGO_MES)
    END) - b.PRESUP_MES AS VAR_MES,
    
    (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM - b.ABONOS_ACUM)
        ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM - b.CARGOS_ACUM)
    END) - b.PRESUP_ACUM AS VAR_ACUM,
    
    /* VARIACIONES vs AÑO ANTERIOR */
    (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGO_MES - b.ABONO_MES)
        ELSE (b.ABONO_MES - b.CARGO_MES)
    END) - (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGO_MES_ANT - b.ABONO_MES_ANT)
        ELSE (b.ABONO_MES_ANT - b.CARGO_MES_ANT)
    END) AS VAR_MES_ANT,
    
    (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM - b.ABONOS_ACUM)
        ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM - b.CARGOS_ACUM)
    END) - (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
        THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT - b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT)
        ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT - b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT)
    END) AS VAR_ACUM_ANT,
    
    /* ========= PORCENTAJES ========= */
    /* 1. Ppto vs real MES: (REAL_MES / PRESUP_MES - 1) * 100 */
    CASE 
        WHEN b.PRESUP_MES = 0 OR b.PRESUP_MES IS NULL THEN 0
        ELSE ((CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGO_MES - b.ABONO_MES)
                ELSE (b.ABONO_MES - b.CARGO_MES)
              END) / b.PRESUP_MES - 1) * 100
    END AS PCT_REAL_VS_PPTO_MES,
    
    /* 2. Real ant vs real MES: (REAL_MES / REAL_MES_ANT - 1) * 100 */
    CASE 
        WHEN (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGO_MES_ANT - b.ABONO_MES_ANT)
                ELSE (b.ABONO_MES_ANT - b.CARGO_MES_ANT)
              END) = 0 OR (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGO_MES_ANT - b.ABONO_MES_ANT)
                ELSE (b.ABONO_MES_ANT - b.CARGO_MES_ANT)
              END) IS NULL THEN 0
        ELSE ((CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGO_MES - b.ABONO_MES)
                ELSE (b.ABONO_MES - b.CARGO_MES)
              END) / (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGO_MES_ANT - b.ABONO_MES_ANT)
                ELSE (b.ABONO_MES_ANT - b.CARGO_MES_ANT)
              END) - 1) * 100
    END AS PCT_REAL_VS_ANT_MES,
    
    /* 3. Ppto vs real ACUM: (REAL_ACUM / PRESUP_ACUM - 1) * 100 */
    CASE 
        WHEN b.PRESUP_ACUM = 0 OR b.PRESUP_ACUM IS NULL THEN 0
        ELSE ((CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM - b.ABONOS_ACUM)
                ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM - b.CARGOS_ACUM)
              END) / b.PRESUP_ACUM - 1) * 100
    END AS PCT_REAL_VS_PPTO_ACUM,
    
    /* 4. Real ant vs real ACUM: (REAL_ACUM / REAL_ACUM_ANT - 1) * 100 */
    CASE 
        WHEN (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT - b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT)
                ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT - b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT)
              END) = 0 OR (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT - b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT)
                ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT - b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT)
              END) IS NULL THEN 0
        ELSE ((CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM - b.ABONOS_ACUM)
                ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM - b.CARGOS_ACUM)
              END) / (CASE WHEN b.NATZ='D' 
                THEN (b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT - b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT)
                ELSE (b.ABONOS_ACUM_ANT - b.CARGOS_ACUM_ANT)
              END) - 1) * 100
    END AS PCT_REAL_VS_ANT_ACUM
    
FROM base b
WHERE ( :nivel IS NULL OR :nivel = 0 OR b.NIVEL = :nivel )
ORDER BY b.NUM_CTA;
